title: cordylanthus tenuis subsp. tenuis
intro: Cordylanthus tenuis subsp. tenuis, also known as the slender bird's beak, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae), native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cordylanthus tenuis subsp. tenuis include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and soothe digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
